title: kb-sync scout prose output (Phase B)
description: Judgment-only JSON the Haiku prose pass (Phase B) augments into the scout-cache. Structured inventory keys (cli/errors/adrs/identity/docs_present/harvest_counts) are written by kb-harvest.py in Phase A and are NOT present here — never emit them. Mirrors the inline SCOUT_SCHEMA in workflow.js.

summary.description: 2-4 sentence grounded executive summary: what it is + current state. Never invented.

nextsteps.description: Executive step-by-step plan (3-12 ordered steps) to the project's primary objective. Replaces next_action. [] if none recorded. NEVER invented.

problem.description: The problem statement the project solves. null if not recorded. NEVER invented.

solution.description: How the problem is being solved + why that approach. null if not recorded. NEVER invented.

objective.description: The final deliverable / outcome the project is working toward. null if not recorded. NEVER invented.

file.description: REPO-RELATIVE path to the file needing review/edit to progress. null if none identifiable. NEVER absolute, NEVER invented.

next_command.description: EXACT next command quoted verbatim, ONLY if the repo states one. null otherwise. NEVER invented. Absence is data.

blockers.description: Explicit blockers/risks/failing-gate notes. [] if none recorded. Never invented.

slug.description: Kebab-case, period-free, derived from the blocker's core topic. Stable across syncs, unique within project.

unblock.description: Concrete removal step harvested from the repo; null if none stated. NEVER invented.

architecture.description: Prose architecture judgment. Omit entirely if nothing useful beyond summary.

summary.description: 2-4 sentences: structure, components, substrate, key deps.

reuse_tags.description: Controlled PERIOD-FREE reuse tags: pattern/*, tool/*, lang/*, capability/* (ADR-0002). 3-8, accurate not generous. null/omit if nothing clearly reusable.

fallback_cli.description: ONLY emitted when kb-harvest.py found NO CLI commands for this repo (flagged in dispatch). Low-confidence. Default: omit this key entirely.
